app.name: Smart Residential Platform
app.tagline_long: The Operating System for Residential Communities

roles.no_roles: Your account is set up — ask your administrator to assign a role.
roles.no_roles_assigned: No roles assigned yet. Ask your administrator to give you access.

auth.sign_in_subtitle: Use your work email to access the platform.

common.offline_body: We can't reach the network. Once you're back online, SRP will resync your data automatically.
common.name: Name

headers.dashboard_desc: Overview of your compound at a glance.
headers.no_snapshot_desc: Click "Refresh now" to compute one for your organization.
headers.reviews_desc: All resident reviews across the marketplace.
headers.saas_console_desc: Platform-wide tenant, plan, and revenue management.
headers.branding_desc: White-label your tenant — logo, colors, typography.
headers.orders_desc: Orders placed by residents through the marketplace.
headers.risk_desc: Heuristic predictor. Higher scores = greater delinquency risk.
headers.pricing_rules_desc: Dynamic service fees — by apartment size, consumption tiers, time-of-use, or formulas.
headers.integrations_desc: Adapter configurations for utility providers — Mikrotik, UniFi, Modbus, RADIUS, REST APIs.
headers.devices_desc: Every IoT device the platform tracks — smart meters, gates, locks, cameras, sensors.
headers.access_zones_desc: Gates, doors, parkings, and amenities — controllable entry points.
headers.access_logs_desc: Every entry/exit attempt — granted, denied, or overridden.
headers.erp_desc: Connect SRP to your accounting system — payments push as journal entries automatically.
headers.finance_desc: Collections, outstanding balances, overdue trackers, and analytics.
headers.outstanding_aging_desc: How long unpaid amounts have been outstanding
headers.top_overdue_empty: No overdue balances — everything is current.
headers.account_desc: Information from your Supabase auth profile.
headers.operations_desc: Real-time view of tickets, maintenance, visitors, and bookings.
headers.utility_bills_desc: Electricity, internet, gas, water, and recurring service bills. Apply penalties and record payments.
headers.no_utility_bills_desc: Generate recurring bills or create one from a meter reading.
headers.resident_no_assignments: No unit assignments for this resident yet.
headers.no_schedule_generated: No schedule generated. Click "Generate schedule" above to create it.

dashboard.recent_residents_desc: The five most recently added residents in your scope.
dashboard.no_residents_yet: No residents yet — add one from the Residents page.

mobile.subject: Subject
mobile.receipt_footer: This is an electronically-generated receipt and is valid without a signature.
mobile.payment_thank_you: Thank you. Your payment is being processed. Your bill will update within a few seconds.
mobile.contract_not_yours: This contract is not assigned to you.
mobile.contract_no_template: No template configured. Please contact your compound manager.
mobile.contract_please_read: Please read the contract below carefully, then sign at the bottom.
mobile.no_contracts: You don't have any contracts yet. Your compound manager will create one once your unit is assigned.
mobile.marketplace_no_providers: No providers in your compound yet.

search.placeholder_input: Search for a resident, unit, contract, payment, ticket…
search.type_two_chars: Type at least two characters to search
search.searches_in: Searches in: Residents · Units · Contracts · Payments · Tickets · Providers

hardware.page_desc: Pick a service provider from the list to test its connection — no data is affected. Supports MikroTik, UniFi, Modbus TCP, MQTT, REST, RADIUS, and webhooks.
hardware.search_placeholder: Search by provider name or code…
hardware.count_summary: {count} providers. To test every provider at once, wait a minute between tests (rate limit: 5/minute per IP).
hardware.no_providers: No providers match the search. Try simplifying the filter or add a new provider from

permissions.page_desc: Control feature toggles and customize permissions for each role. Changes apply immediately to every user.
permissions.tip_legend: Green check = allowed, red X = denied — click to toggle
permissions.tip_override: Orange ring means an overridden capability (different from the code default)
permissions.tip_reset: The reset icon restores the default setting
permissions.tip_immediate: Changes apply immediately to every user in this role
permissions.banner_super: Super admins see disabled features in the sidebar with a 🔒 indicator (so you don't lock yourself out).
permissions.banner_others: Other users have those features hidden completely.

wallet.auto_restore_note: Service will be restored automatically as soon as payment arrives.
wallet.cash_needs_approval: Cash payment requires manager approval. Contact the management office.
wallet.gateway_dev_fallback: The payment will be recorded directly (dev mode).
wallet.notice_stripe: You will be redirected to Stripe to complete payment.
wallet.notice_fastpay: You will be redirected to the FastPay app to complete payment.
wallet.notice_zaincash: You will be redirected to the ZainCash app to complete payment.
wallet.notice_asiapay: You will be redirected to AsiaHawala to complete payment.
wallet.notice_nass: You will be redirected to the NASS Pay app. Your balance will update automatically after completion.
wallet.notice_qicard: Enter your Qi Card number on the next screen to complete payment.
wallet.no_wallet: No wallet found. Your compound manager will set one up after assigning your unit.
wallet.no_wallets_yet: You don't have any wallets yet.
wallet.pending_tokens_title: Top-up tokens awaiting entry into the meter
wallet.enter_token_manually: Enter the token manually on the meter to activate the service.

forms.name: Name
forms.title: Title
forms.adapter_note: The system is integration-ready. Live hardware/API hookup is configured later.
forms.commission_value_note: Percentage (e.g. 10 = 10%) or flat amount per order, depending on kind.
forms.description_placeholder_service: What this provider offers and who they serve.
forms.auto_suspend_label: Auto-suspend service if bills go overdue
forms.service_card_desc: What kind of utility, who delivers it, and at what fee.
forms.assignment_card_desc: Which unit (and optionally which resident) is being subscribed.
forms.no_providers_seed_hint: . Add one or seed providers first.
forms.resident_invites_desc: Generate a one-time invite link so a new resident can create their own account for this unit.
forms.no_invites_yet: No invites yet for this unit.
forms.confirm_revoke_invite: Revoke this invite? The code will stop working immediately.
forms.search_users_placeholder: Search by email, name, or ID…
forms.no_users_match: No users match the current filters.
forms.create_user_desc: The user will be email-confirmed automatically and can sign in immediately. Grant roles after creation.
forms.no_roles_assigned_user: No roles assigned. The user can sign in but won't see any modules.
forms.toast_contract_generate_hint: Generate schedule on the detail page to activate.
forms.toast_password_reset_share: Password reset — share securely with the user
forms.toast_will_prompt_next: User will be prompted next sign-in
forms.confirm_signout_all: Sign {email} out of all their devices?
forms.confirm_lock_year: Lock {email} out for 365 days? They won't be able to sign in.
forms.confirm_delete_user: Permanently delete {email} and all their roles? This cannot be undone.
forms.confirm_delete_plan: Delete plan "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
forms.basic_info_desc: The visible identity and tier of this plan.
forms.plan_active_label: Plan is active and available for new organizations
forms.unit_rate_note: For per_sqm: rate per square meter. For per_resident: rate per active resident. For ToU/seasonal: default rate.
forms.priority_note: Lower wins when multiple rules match.

ops.tickets_no_results_desc: When residents report issues, they'll appear here.
ops.new_ticket_desc: Open a complaint or maintenance request.
ops.visitors_desc: Visitor registry with QR-coded passes and security logs.
ops.visitors_no_results_desc: Register visitors to issue passes and track entries.
ops.visitor_present_at_gate: Present this code at the gate
ops.register_visitor_desc: Generate a visitor pass with QR code.
ops.facilities_desc: Bookable amenities: gyms, pools, meeting rooms, halls.
ops.facilities_empty_desc: Add facilities so residents can book them.
ops.new_facility_desc: Add a facility residents can book.
ops.new_facility_desc_full: Pool, gym, hall, court… anything residents can reserve. Set fees and approval policy.
ops.providers_empty_desc: Register your first marketplace provider — restaurant, plumber, cleaner, grocery, etc.
ops.add_service_provider_desc: Register a marketplace provider with commission terms.
ops.orders_empty_desc: Orders will appear here as residents place them.
ops.new_order_desc: Place an order on behalf of a resident.
ops.subscriptions_desc: Recurring services that auto-generate bills: electricity, internet, gas, water, maintenance.
ops.subscriptions_empty_desc: Connect a unit to a utility provider so the system auto-generates monthly bills.
ops.new_subscription_desc: Subscribe a unit to a utility service.
ops.new_subscription_desc_full: Subscribe a unit to a utility provider. Bills will auto-generate based on the billing cycle.
ops.new_subscription_no_units: No units yet — create a unit first.
ops.new_subscription_no_providers: No providers yet — add one before creating a subscription.
ops.utilities_desc: Smart infrastructure overview — electricity, internet, gas, water.
ops.utilities_electricity_desc: Manage meters and record readings to generate consumption bills.
ops.utilities_other_desc: Water, gas, generator, and recurring services.
ops.bookings_desc: Reservations across all facilities, pending approvals, and history.
ops.bookings_empty_desc: Bookings will appear here when residents reserve facilities.
ops.new_booking_desc_full: Reserve a facility for a resident. Conflicts are auto-detected.
ops.new_booking_no_facilities: No facilities yet — create one first.
ops.maintenance_desc: Work orders, scheduled jobs, and technician assignments.
ops.maintenance_empty_desc: Create work orders manually or from tickets.
ops.maintenance_actions_desc: Move the job through its lifecycle.
ops.new_maintenance_desc_full: Create a corrective, preventive, or emergency work order. Assign a technician now or later.
ops.new_maintenance_no_compounds: No compounds yet — create one first.

settings.prefs_desc: Personalize your theme, accent color, and notifications.
settings.accent_desc: Pick a personal accent. Org branding still wins for hero areas.

cashier.page_desc: Find an unpaid installment and record a payment in one click.
cashier.empty: No unpaid installments match the filter.

gateways.page_desc: Add, configure, enable or disable payment providers without touching code.
gateways.add_desc: Pick a provider and enter the credentials it gave you.
gateways.no_credentials_needed: No credentials needed for this provider.
gateways.empty: No gateways configured. Click "Add gateway" to get started.
gateways.confirm_delete: Delete this gateway? Existing payments stay intact.
